asset_name: Cage Room Shell — static base layer
shared_properties: Warm indoor mood with PICO-8 readable silhouettes.
Perch, floor, wall, and bowl anchor zones stay locked for all sibling assets.
differences: This file carries the opaque room shell only.
Foreground cage bars and interactive overlays stay outside this task.

reference_images.label: proxy_environment_spacing
reference_images.purpose: Proxy background reference for room depth, floor band spacing, and low-resolution prop anchors.

reference_images.label: proxy_pixel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Proxy moodboard for preserving the warm compact pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/world_cage_room_shell_static.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under world_cage_room_shell_static.
runtime_notes: Spawn this sprite before every other world or UI entity so anchor positions stay stable.
Keep the sprite at z=0 and render it with nearest-neighbor sampling only.
Author the floor band inside the same texture so cleanup states align without runtime stitching.

context.usage: Base room shell shown during the full play session behind Echo, props, and UI.

composition: Wall fill uses #FFF1E8 on at least 72 percent of the canvas.
Perch spans x=24..104 at y=80 with 4px height using #AB5236 and a 1px #1D2B53 underside.
Floor band fills y=110..127 with #FFCCAA so dirt markers stay readable.
Food bowl anchor box starts at x=16 y=100 and water bowl anchor box starts at x=40 y=100.

shape.silhouette: 128x128 room shell with a cream wall field, centered perch, lower floor band, and two bowl anchor zones on the left half.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 128x128px and fully opaque.
Perch top edge lands at y=80 and leaves clear headroom for a 40x40 Echo sprite centered near x=64 y=60.
Floor zone from y=110 to y=127 remains unobstructed so five 2x2 dirt marks fit without overlap.
Only listed colors and transparency rules are used, with no gradients or anti-aliasing.
